observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with printing error
Visual pattern suggesting missing or distorted text imprint
Localized deviation from normal capsule appearance
mechanism_explanation: Printing mechanism malfunction causes incomplete or distorted markings.
severity_visual_description: minor missing or distorted text imprint visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Clean print heads and recalibrate printing alignment.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the missing or distorted text imprint would be absent and surface appears normal.
